hero.title: Automate Customer Calls with AI
hero.description: Deploy AI voice agents that handle customer calls in Uzbek, capture leads, analyze sentiment, and provide reliable 24/7 support.

item2.title: Trilingual Communication
item2.desc: Seamlessly switch between English, Uzbek, and Russian. Our AI agents understand and respond naturally in all three languages, breaking down communication barriers.

item3.title: Lead Collection & CRM
item3.desc: Automatically capture leads, names, contact details, and customer information. Sync directly with your CRM and never miss a potential opportunity again.

item4.title: Sentiment & Intent Analysis
item4.desc: Real-time emotion detection and intent recognition. Understand if customers are happy, frustrated, or ready to buy, and adapt your approach instantly.

item5.title: Cross-Platform Deployment
item5.desc: Deploy on desktop, mobile, web, and tablet. Your AI agents work everywhere your customers are, providing consistent service across all devices.

features_accordion.title: AI-Powered Call Excellence
features_accordion.desc: Transform your call center with real-time conversation intelligence. Get instant coaching, detect customer sentiment, and close more deals with AI-guided conversations.

coaching.title: Real-Time Call Coaching
coaching.desc: Get instant suggestions during live calls. Our AI analyzes conversations in real-time and provides contextual prompts to help agents overcome objections and guide conversations toward successful outcomes.

sentiment.title: Sentiment & Emotion Detection
sentiment.desc: Detect customer emotions instantly with advanced NLP. Know when they're interested, skeptical, or frustrated so agents can adjust their approach and improve customer satisfaction.

analytics.title: Conversation Analytics
analytics.desc: Track performance metrics like talk-to-listen ratios, keyword frequency, and conversion patterns. Turn every conversation into actionable data that drives continuous improvement.

insights.title: Performance Insights
insights.desc: Monitor team performance, identify top performers, and replicate winning strategies across your entire team. Get detailed reports on call outcomes and agent effectiveness.

ui.insight_text: Sarah's empathy scoring improved by 14% after recent coaching.

cta.title: Deploy AI Agents That Speak Your Customers Language
cta.subtitle: Start with 100 free minutes across all three languages.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Discover quick and comprehensive answers to common questions about our AI call center agents and multilingual capabilities.
faqs.contact_prefix: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our

item-1.q: Which languages do your AI agents support?
item-1.a: Our AI agents are fluent in English, Uzbek, and Russian. They understand natural conversation patterns, cultural nuances, and regional dialects in all three languages, providing authentic customer interactions.

item-2.q: Can the AI agents collect and qualify leads?
item-2.a: Absolutely. Our AI agents are trained to engage prospects naturally, collect names, contact information, company details, and specific requirements. They qualify leads based on your criteria and sync everything directly to your CRM.

item-3.q: What platforms do your AI agents work on?
item-3.a: Our AI agents work across all platforms—desktop computers, mobile phones, tablets, and web browsers. They provide consistent service whether your team is in the office or working remotely, with native mobile apps for iOS and Android.

item-4.q: How accurate is the sentiment analysis?
item-4.a: Our sentiment analysis achieves over 95% accuracy across all three languages. It detects happiness, frustration, confusion, and urgency by analyzing tone, word choice, and conversation patterns, allowing you to respond appropriately in real-time.

item-5.q: Can I customize the AI agent scripts and workflows?
item-5.a: Yes, you have complete control. Customize conversation flows, brand voice, qualifying questions, and response patterns. Our no-code workflow builder lets you design agent behaviors for different scenarios, products, and customer types.

voice_comparison.title: Standard vs Super Realistic
voice_comparison.subtitle: Super realistic voices use advanced AI to sound indistinguishable from human agents. Your customers won't know they're talking to AI.
voice_comparison.footer: Super realistic calls are included in Professional and Business plans.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Call Centers Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See how AI agents are transforming customer engagement across languages and platforms.

Dilshod Karimov.quote: The Uzbek language support is phenomenal. We can now serve our entire customer base without hiring specialized bilingual agents. Our coverage has expanded by 300%.

Elena Volkov.quote: Russian-speaking customers finally get the same quality service as our English base. The AI captures leads perfectly in all three languages and syncs seamlessly with our CRM.

Michael Chen.quote: Lead collection has never been easier. The AI agents qualify prospects 24/7, collect all the details we need, and only pass hot leads to our sales team. We have doubled our qualified leads.

Zarina Ahmedova.quote: Sentiment analysis across languages is incredible. We can tell instantly when a customer is frustrated, regardless of whether they are speaking English, Uzbek, or Russian. Response time improved by 60%.

Alex Thompson.quote: Mobile deployment was a game-changer. Our field agents use the AI agents on their phones to handle initial calls, collect customer info, and schedule appointments. Productivity is through the roof.

Nadiya Kovalenko.quote: We tested four different solutions before finding this. The trilingual capabilities are authentic—not just basic translation, but true contextual understanding in Uzbek and Russian dialects.

Ravshan Rustamov.quote: As a Uzbek business expanding internationally, we needed authentic language support. This solution let us serve local Uzbek customers and international clients with the same quality and efficiency.

Sofia Petrova.quote: Implementation was shockingly fast. We had our first AI agent handling Russian customer inquiries within hours. The desktop and mobile sync works flawlessly across our distributed team.

James Morrison.quote: The ROI was immediate. We deployed AI agents for after-hours English support, then expanded to Uzbek and Russian markets. Revenue from those regions grew 180% in six months.

Gulnara Tashpulatova.quote: Lead quality improved dramatically. The AI does not just collect names—it qualifies prospects, identifies buying intent, and passes complete customer profiles to our team.

Dmitri Sokolov.quote: The sentiment analysis accuracy is scary good. It picks up subtle frustration cues in Russian that human agents sometimes miss. Our customer satisfaction scores reflect the difference.

Layla Ahmed.quote: As a small business, we could not afford a multilingual support team. These AI agents let us punch way above our weight, serving three language markets with enterprise-level quality.
